{\n  const raw = await readFile(join(DATA_DIR, filename), \"utf8\");\n  return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\n}\n\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\n  // Initialize all observability subsystems (OTel, tracing, metrics — logger is import-time)\n  await initObservability();\n\n  // Validate security configuration first (fail-fast on critical issues)\n  validateSecurityOrThrow();\n\n  // Configure email provider for password reset emails\n  const emailProvider = (process.env[\"EMAIL_PROVIDER\"] ?? \"console\") as\n    | \"sendgrid\"\n    | \"ses\"\n    | \"smtp\"\n    | \"console\";\n  configureEmailProvider({\n    provider: emailProvider,\n    apiKey: process.env[\"SENDGRID_API_KEY\"],\n    fromEmail: process.env[\"EMAIL_FROM\"] ?? \"noreply@mtamyway.com\",\n    fromName: variable is set (for E2E tests)\n  const testMode = process.env[\"TEST_MODE\"] === \"true\";\n  if (testMode) {\n    setRateLimiterTestMode(true);\n    logger.info(\"Test mode enabled\");\n  }\n\n  logger.info(\"Server startup\", {\n    version: PACKAGE_VERSION,\n    port: PORT,\n    data_dir: DATA_DIR,\n    web_dist: WEB_DIST,\n  });\n\n  // Load GTFS static data in parallel\n  let stations: StationIndex;\n  let routes: RouteIndex;\n  let complexes: ComplexIndex;\n  let transfers: Record<string, TransferConnection[]>;\n\n  try {\n    [stations, routes, complexes, transfers] = await Promise.all([\n      loadJsonFile<StationIndex>(\"stations.json\"),\n      loadJsonFile<RouteIndex>(\"routes.json\"),\n      loadJsonFile<ComplexIndex>(\"complexes.json\"),\n      loadJsonFile<Record<string, TransferConnection[]>>(\"transfers.json\"),\n    ]);\n\n    // Load travel times into module cache before createApp builds the TransferEngine\n    const travelTimes = await loadTravelTimes(join(DATA_DIR, \"travel-times.json\"));\n\n    // Initialize delay detector for predictive alerts\n    initDelayDetector(travelTimes, routes, stations);\n\n    // Initialize delay predictor for historical pattern analysis\n    if (testMode) {\n      initDelayPredictorForTesting();\n    }\n    initDelayPredictor(travelTimes, stations);\n\n    logger.info(\"Static data loaded\", {\n      stations: Object.keys(stations).length,\n      routes: Object.keys(routes).length,\n      complexes: Object.keys(complexes).length,\n      transfers: Object.keys(transfers).length,\n    });\n  } catch (err) {\n    logger.error(\"Failed to load static data\", err as Error, {\n      hint: \"Run: npm run process-gtfs --workspace=packages/server\",\n    });\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n\n  // Hono app (builds TransferEngine internally from loaded data)\n  const app = createApp(stations, routes, complexes, transfers, WEB_DIST);\n\n  // Push notification subsystem\n  const pushDbPath = process.env[\"PUSH_DB_PATH\"] ?? join(DATA_DIR, \"subscriptions.db\");\n  initPushDatabase(pushDbPath);\n  const pushDb = getPushDatabase();\n\n  // Run database migrations\n  try {\n    const results = await runMigrations(pushDb);\n    const applied = results.filter((r) => r.applied);\n    if (applied.length > 0) {\n      logger.info(\"Database migrations applied\", {\n        count: Resets on pod restart — acceptable\n * for single-container deployment. Cloudflare WAF is the first line\n * of defense; this is the second.\n */\n\nimport type { MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\n\ninterface TokenBucket {\n  tokens: number;\n  lastRefill: number;\n}\n\nconst TOKENS_PER_MINUTE = 60;\nconst REFILL_INTERVAL_MS = 1000; // Refill 1 token per second\nconst MAX_TOKENS = TOKENS_PER_MINUTE;\n\nconst buckets = new Map<string, TokenBucket>();\n\n/** Test mode flag - when true, rate limiting is disabled */\nlet testMode = false;\n\n/** Enable or disable test mode (useful for E2E tests) */\nexport function setRateLimiterTestMode(enabled: boolean): void {\n  testMode = enabled;\n}\n\n/** Get current test mode state */\nexport function getRateLimiterTestMode(): boolean {\n  return testMode;\n}\n\n/** Reset rate limiter state (useful for testing) */\nexport function resetRateLimiter(): void {\n  buckets.clear();\n}\n\n// Prune stale buckets every 5 minutes\nconst PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS = 300_000;\nlet lastPrune = Date.now();\n\nfunction getClientIp(c: { req: { header(name: string): string | undefined } }): string {\n  // Cloudflare tunnel sets CF-Connecting-IP\n  return (\n    c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n    c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n    \"unknown\"\n  );\n}\n\nfunction refillBucket(bucket: TokenBucket, now: number): void {\n  const elapsed = now - bucket.lastRefill;\n  const tokensToAdd = Math.floor(elapsed / REFILL_INTERVAL_MS);\n  if (tokensToAdd > 0) {\n    bucket.tokens = Math.min(MAX_TOKENS, bucket.tokens + tokensToAdd);\n    bucket.lastRefill = now - (elapsed % REFILL_INTERVAL_MS);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Token bucket rate limiter middleware.\n * Returns 429 with structured error when rate limit is exceeded.\n */\nexport function rateLimiter(): MiddlewareHandler {\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    // Skip rate limiting in test mode\n    if (testMode) {\n      await next();\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const now = Date.now();\n    const ip = getClientIp(c);\n\n    // Periodic prune of old buckets to prevent memory leak\n    if (now - lastPrune > PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS) {\n      for (const [key, bucket] of buckets) {\n        if (now - bucket.lastRefill > MAX_TOKENS * REFILL_INTERVAL_MS * 2) {\n          buckets.delete(key);\n        }\n      }\n      lastPrune = now;\n    }\n\n    let bucket = buckets.get(ip);\n    if (!bucket) {\n      bucket = { tokens: MAX_TOKENS, lastRefill: now };\n      buckets.set(ip, bucket);\n    }\n\n    refillBucket(bucket, now);\n\n    // Epoch-second when the next token will be added\n    const resetEpoch = Math.ceil((bucket.lastRefill + REFILL_INTERVAL_MS) / 1000);\n\n    if (bucket.tokens <= 0) {\n      const retryAfter = Math.ceil(REFILL_INTERVAL_MS / 1000);\n      c.header(\"Retry-After\", String(retryAfter));\n      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", String(MAX_TOKENS));\n      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", \"0\");\n      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", String(resetEpoch));\n      return c.json(\n        {\n          error: \"Too many requests\",\n          retryAfter,\n        },\n        429\n      );\n    }\n\n    bucket.tokens -= 1;\n    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", String(MAX_TOKENS));\n    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", String(Math.floor(bucket.tokens)));\n    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", String(resetEpoch));\n    await next();\n  };\n}\n","numLines":120,"startLine":1,"totalLines":120}}}

*/\n44\tconst DEFAULT_WEATHER: WeatherCondition = \"clear\";\n45\t\n46\t/** Probability threshold for considering a delay \"likely\" */\n47\tconst _DELAY_PROBABILITY_THRESHOLD = 0.3;\n48\t\n49\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n50\t// Types\n51\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n52\t\n53\t/** Delay timeBucket: TimeBucket;\n66\t  dayCategory: DayCategory;\n67\t}\n68\t\n69\t/** Aggregated stats for a pattern */\n70\tinterface AggregatedStats {\n71\t  routeId: string;\n72\t  direction: \"N\" | (default: 100k) */\n86\t  maxRecords?: number;\n87\t  /** Minimum observations for predictions (default: 5) */\n88\t  minObservations?: number;\n89\t  /** Path to persist delay data (optional) */\n90\t  persistencePath?: string;\n91\t}\n92\t\n93\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n94\t// Module state\n95\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n96\t\n97\t/** Historical delay records */\n98\tlet delayRecords: StoredDelayRecord[] = [];\n99\t\n100\t/** Aggregated statistics by pattern key */\n101\tconst aggregatedStats = new Map<string, AggregatedStats>();\n102\t\n103\t/** Weather override (for testing; null = use actual weather) */\n104\tlet weatherOverride: WeatherCondition | null = null;\n105\t\n106\t/** Current weather condition (cached) */\n107\tlet currentWeather: WeatherCondition = DEFAULT_WEATHER;\n108\t\n109\tlet config: Required<DelayPredictorConfig>;\n110\tlet _travelTimes: TravelTimeIndex | null = null;\n111\tlet stations: StationIndex | null = null;\n112\t\n113\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n114\t// Time bucket utilities\n115\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n116\t\n117\t/**\n118\t * Get the time bucket for a given hour\n119\t */\n120\texport function getTimeBucket(hour: number): TimeBucket {\n121\t  if (hour >= 4 && hour < 6) return \"early_morning\";\n122\t  if (hour >= 6 && hour < 10) return \"morning_rush\";\n123\t  if (hour >= 10 && hour < 15) return \"midday\";\n124\t  if (hour >= 15 && hour < 19) return \"evening_rush\";\n125\t  return \"night\";\n126\t}\n127\t\n128\t/**\n129\t * Get the time bucket for a timestamp\n130\t */\n131\texport function getTimeBucketForTimestamp(timestamp: number): TimeBucket {\n132\t  const date = new Date(timestamp);\n133\t  return getTimeBucket(date.getHours());\n134\t}\n135\t\n136\t/**\n137\t * Get the day category for a date\n138\t */\n139\texport function getDayCategory(date: Date): DayCategory {\n140\t  const day = date.getDay();\n141\t  if (day === 0) return \"sunday\";\n142\t  if (day === 6) return \"saturday\";\n143\t  return \"weekday\";\n144\t}\n145\t\n146\t/**\n147\t * Get the day category for a timestamp\n148\t */\n149\texport function getDayCategoryForTimestamp(timestamp: number): DayCategory {\n150\t  return getDayCategory(new Date(timestamp));\n151\t}\n152\t\n153\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n154\t// Initialization\n155\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n156\t\n157\t/**\n158\t * Initialize the delay predictor with dependencies.\n159\t */\n160\texport function initDelayPredictor(\n161\t  travelTimesData: TravelTimeIndex,\n162\t  stationData: StationIndex,\n163\t  predictorConfig?: DelayPredictorConfig\n164\t): void {\n165\t  _travelTimes = travelTimesData;\n166\t  stations = stationData;\n167\t  config = {\n168\t    maxRecords: predictorConfig?.maxRecords ?? MAX_DELAY_RECORDS,\n169\t    minObservations: predictorConfig?.minObservations ?? MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n170\t    persistencePath: predictorConfig?.persistencePath ?? \"\",\n171\t  };\n172\t\n173\t  logger.info(\"Delay predictor initialized\", {\n174\t    maxRecords: config.maxRecords,\n175\t    minObservations: config.minObservations,\n176\t  });\n177\t}\n178\t\n179\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n180\t// Data collection\n181\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n182\t\n183\t/**\n184\t * Record a delay observation from the delay detector.\n185\t * Called automatically when a delayed segment is detected.\n186\t */\n187\texport function recordDelay(\n188\t  routeId: string,\n189\t  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n190\t  fromStationId: string,\n191\t  toStationId: string,\n192\t  actualSeconds: number,\n193\t  scheduledSeconds: number,\n194\t  tripId: string\n195\t): void {\n196\t  const now = Date.now();\n197\t  const delayRatio = actualSeconds / scheduledSeconds;\n198\t\n199\t  const record: StoredDelayRecord = {\n200\t    id: `${tripId}-${fromStationId}-${toStationId}-${now}`,\n201\t    routeId,\n202\t    direction,\n203\t    fromStationId,\n204\t    toStationId,\n205\t    actualSeconds,\n206\t    scheduledSeconds,\n207\t    delayRatio,\n208\t    timestamp: new Date(now).toISOString(),\n209\t    timestampMs: now,\n210\t    timeBucket: getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now),\n211\t    dayCategory: getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now),\n212\t    tripId,\n213\t    weather: weatherOverride ?? currentWeather,\n214\t  };\n215\t\n216\t  delayRecords.push(record);\n217\t\n218\t  // Trim if exceeding max\n219\t  if (delayRecords.length > config.maxRecords) {\n220\t    delayRecords = delayRecords.slice(-config.maxRecords);\n221\t  }\n222\t\n223\t  // Update aggregated stats\n224\t  updateAggregatedStats(record);\n225\t\n226\t  logger.debug(\"Delay recorded\", {\n227\t    routeId,\n228\t    direction,\n229\t    from: fromStationId,\n230\t    to: toStationId,\n231\t    delayRatio: Math.round(delayRatio * 100) / 100,\n232\t    totalRecords: delayRecords.length,\n233\t  });\n234\t}\n235\t\n236\t/**\n237\t * Update aggregated statistics for a pattern\n238\t */\n239\tfunction updateAggregatedStats(record: StoredDelayRecord): void {\n240\t  const key = buildPatternKey(\n241\t    record.routeId,\n242\t    record.direction,\n243\t    record.fromStationId,\n244\t    record.toStationId,\n245\t    record.timeBucket,\n246\t    record.dayCategory\n247\t  );\n248\t\n249\t  let stats = aggregatedStats.get(key);\n250\t\n251\t  if (!stats) {\n252\t    stats = {\n253\t      routeId: record.routeId,\n254\t      direction: record.direction,\n255\t      fromStationId: record.fromStationId,\n256\t      toStationId: record.toStationId,\n257\t      timeBucket: record.timeBucket,\n258\t      dayCategory: record.dayCategory,\n259\t      totalObservations: 0,\n260\t      delayCount: 0,\n261\t      delayRatios: [],\n262\t      lastUpdated: Date.now(),\n263\t    };\n264\t    aggregatedStats.set(key, stats);\n265\t  }\n266\t\n267\t  stats.totalObservations++;\n268\t  stats.delayCount++;\n269\t  stats.delayRatios.push(record.delayRatio);\n270\t  stats.lastUpdated = Date.now();\n271\t\n272\t  // Keep only last 1000 delay ratios per pattern\n273\t  if (stats.delayRatios.length > 1000) {\n274\t    stats.delayRatios = stats.delayRatios.slice(-1000);\n275\t  }\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\t/**\n279\t * Build a pattern key for aggregated stats lookup\n280\t */\n281\tfunction buildPatternKey(\n282\t  routeId: string,\n283\t  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n284\t  fromStationId: string,\n285\t  toStationId: string,\n286\t  timeBucket: TimeBucket,\n287\t  dayCategory: DayCategory\n288\t): string {\n289\t  return `${routeId}:${direction}:${fromStationId}:${toStationId}:${timeBucket}:${dayCategory}`;\n290\t}\n291\t\n292\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n293\t// Prediction API\n294\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n295\t\n296\t/**\n297\t * Get a delay prediction for a trip between two stations.\n298\t * Returns prediction with probability and factors.\n299\t */\n300\texport function predictDelay(\n301\t  routeId: string,\n302\t  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n303\t  fromStationId: string,\n304\t  toStationId: string,\n305\t  scheduledSeconds: number\n306\t): DelayPrediction | null {\n307\t  if (!stations) return null;\n308\t\n309\t  const now = Date.now();\n310\t  const timeBucket = getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now);\n311\t  const dayCategory = getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now);\n312\t\n313\t  // Get historical stats for this pattern\n314\t  const stats = getStatsForPattern(\n315\t    routeId,\n316\t    direction,\n317\t    fromStationId,\n318\t    toStationId,\n319\t    timeBucket,\n320\t    dayCategory\n321\t  );\n322\t\n323\t  if (!stats || stats.totalObservations < config.minObservations) {\n324\t    // Not enough data - return null\n325\t    return null;\n326\t  }\n327\t\n328\t  // Calculate base delay probability\n329\t  const delayProbability = stats.delayCount / stats.totalObservations;\n330\t\n331\t  // Get weather impact\n332\t  const weather = weatherOverride ?? currentWeather;\n333\t  const weatherFactor = getWeatherFactor(weather);\n334\t\n335\t  // Adjust probability based on weather\n336\t  const adjustedProbability = Math.min(1, delayProbability * (1 + weatherFactor.impact));\n337\t\n338\t  // Calculate predicted time\n339\t  const avgDelayRatio = stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length;\n340\t  const predictedSeconds = scheduledSeconds * avgDelayRatio;\n341\t\n342\t  // Determine severity\n343\t  const severity = getDelaySeverity(avgDelayRatio);\n344\t\n345\t  // Build factors list\n346\t  const factors: DelayFactor[] = [\n347\t    {\n348\t      type: \"historical\",\n349\t      description: `Based on ${stats.totalObservations} historical observations`,\n350\t      impact: delayProbability - 0.2, // Baseline\n351\t      weight: 0.6,\n352\t    },\n353\t    {\n354\t      type: \"time_of_day\",\n355\t      description: `Current time bucket: ${timeBucket.replace(/_/g, \" \")}`,\n356\t      impact: getTimeBucketFactor(timeBucket),\n357\t      weight: 0.2,\n358\t    },\n359\t    {\n360\t      type: \"day_of_week\",\n361\t      description: `Today is a ${dayCategory}`,\n362\t      impact: getDayCategoryFactor(dayCategory),\n363\t      weight: 0.1,\n364\t    },\n365\t    weatherFactor,\n366\t  ];\n367\t\n368\t  // Add segment-specific factor if we have enough data\n369\t  const segmentStats = getSegmentStats(routeId, fromStationId, toStationId);\n370\t  if (segmentStats && segmentStats.totalObservations >= config.minObservations) {\n371\t    factors.push({\n372\t      type: \"segment\",\n373\t      description: `This segment has ${Math.round(segmentStats.avgDelayRatio * 100)}% average delay ratio`,\n374\t      impact: segmentStats.avgDelayRatio - 1,\n375\t      weight: 0.1,\n376\t    });\n377\t  }\n378\t\n379\t  const fromStation = stations[fromStationId]?.name ?? fromStationId;\n380\t  const toStation = stations[toStationId]?.name ?? toStationId;\n381\t\n382\t  return {\n383\t    tripId: `prediction-${now}`,\n384\t    routeId,\n385\t    direction,\n386\t    fromStationId,\n387\t    fromStationName: fromStation,\n388\t    toStationId,\n389\t    toStationName: toStation,\n390\t    scheduledMinutes: Math.round(scheduledSeconds / 60),\n391\t    predictedMinutes: Math.round(predictedSeconds / 60),\n392\t    delayProbability: Math.round(adjustedProbability * 100) / 100,\n393\t    delaySeverity: severity,\n394\t    confidence: calculateConfidence(stats.totalObservations),\n395\t    factors,\n396\t    predictedAt: new Date(now).toISOString(),\n397\t  };\n398\t}\n399\t\n400\t/**\n401\t * Get delay probability for a route at current time\n402\t */\n403\texport function getRouteDelayProbability(routeId: string, direction: \"N\" | \"S\"): number | null {\n404\t  const now = Date.now();\n405\t  const timeBucket = getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now);\n406\t  const dayCategory = getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now);\n407\t\n408\t  // Get all stats for this route/direction/time/day\n409\t  let totalObservations = 0;\n410\t  let totalDelays = 0;\n411\t\n412\t  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n413\t    if (\n414\t      stats.routeId === routeId &&\n415\t      stats.direction === direction &&\n416\t      stats.timeBucket === timeBucket &&\n417\t      stats.dayCategory === dayCategory\n418\t    ) {\n419\t      totalObservations += stats.totalObservations;\n420\t      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n421\t    }\n422\t  }\n423\t\n424\t  if (totalObservations < config.minObservations) {\n425\t    return null;\n426\t  }\n427\t\n428\t  return totalDelays / totalObservations;\n429\t}\n430\t\n431\t/**\n432\t * Get delay patterns for a route\n433\t */\n434\texport function getRouteDelayPatterns(routeId: string, direction: \"N\" | \"S\"): DelayPattern[] {\n435\t  const patterns: DelayPattern[] = [];\n436\t\n437\t  // Group by time bucket and day category\n438\t  const patternGroups = new Map<string, AggregatedStats[]>();\n439\t\n440\t  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n441\t    if (stats.routeId === routeId && stats.direction === direction) {\n442\t      const key = `${stats.timeBucket}:${stats.dayCategory}`;\n443\t      if (!patternGroups.has(key)) {\n444\t        patternGroups.set(key, []);\n445\t      }\n446\t      patternGroups.get(key)!.push(stats);\n447\t    }\n448\t  }\n449\t\n450\t  // Build patterns\n451\t  for (const [key, groupStats] of patternGroups) {\n452\t    const [timeBucket, dayCategory] = key.split(\":\") as [TimeBucket, DayCategory];\n453\t\n454\t    let totalObs = 0;\n455\t    let totalDelays = 0;\n456\t    let totalDelayRatio = 0;\n457\t\n458\t    for (const stats of groupStats) {\n459\t      totalObs += stats.totalObservations;\n460\t      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n461\t      totalDelayRatio += stats.avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n462\t    }\n463\t\n464\t    patterns.push({\n465\t      timeBucket,\n466\t      dayCategory,\n467\t      stats: groupStats.map(convertToDelayStats),\n468\t      overallDelayProbability: totalObs > 0 ? totalDelays / totalObs : 0,\n469\t      avgDelayMinutes: totalObs > 0 ? (totalDelayRatio / totalObs) * 5 : 0, // Rough estimate\n470\t    });\n471\t  }\n472\t\n473\t  return patterns;\n474\t}\n475\t\n476\t/**\n477\t * Get route delay summary\n478\t */\n479\texport function getRouteDelaySummary(routeId: string): RouteDelaySummary | null {\n480\t  let totalObservations = 0;\n481\t  let totalDelays = 0;\n482\t  let totalDelayRatio = 0;\n483\t\n484\t  const segmentDelays = new Map<string, { from: string; to: string; sum: number; count: number }>();\n485\t\n486\t  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n487\t    if (stats.routeId === routeId) {\n488\t      totalObservations += stats.totalObservations;\n489\t      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n490\t      const avgDelayRatio = stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length;\n491\t      totalDelayRatio += avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n492\t\n493\t      const segKey = `${stats.fromStationId}:${stats.toStationId}`;\n494\t      if (!segmentDelays.has(segKey)) {\n495\t        segmentDelays.set(segKey, {\n496\t          from: stats.fromStationId,\n497\t          to: stats.toStationId,\n498\t          sum: 0,\n499\t          count: 0,\n500\t        });\n501\t      }\n502\t      const seg = segmentDelays.get(segKey)!;\n503\t      seg.sum += avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n504\t      seg.count += stats.totalObservations;\n505\t    }\n506\t  }\n507\t\n508\t  if (totalObservations === 0) return null;\n509\t\n510\t  const onTimePercent = 100 - (totalDelays / totalObservations) * 100;\n511\t  const avgDelay = totalDelayRatio / totalObservations;\n512\t  const reliabilityScore = Math.max(0, 100 - avgDelay * 20);\n513\t\n514\t  // Get worst segments\n515\t  const worstSegments = Array.from(segmentDelays.entries())\n516\t    .map(([, data]) => ({\n517\t      fromStationId: data.from,\n518\t      fromStationName: stations?.[data.from]?.name ?? data.from,\n519\t      toStationId: data.to,\n520\t      toStationName: stations?.[data.to]?.name ?? data.to,\n521\t      avgDelayRatio: data.count > 0 ? data.sum / data.count : 0,\n522\t    }))\n523\t    .sort((a, b) => b.avgDelayRatio - a.avgDelayRatio)\n524\t    .slice(0, 5);\n525\t\n526\t  return {\n527\t    routeId,\n528\t    reliabilityScore: Math.round(reliabilityScore),\n529\t    avgDelayMinutes: Math.round(avgDelay * 5), // Rough estimate\n530\t    onTimePercentage: Math.round(onTimePercent),\n531\t    bestTimeBucket: \"midday\", // Simplified\n532\t    worstTimeBucket: \"evening_rush\", // Simplified\n533\t    worstSegments,\n534\t  };\n535\t}\n536\t\n537\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n538\t// Helper functions\n539\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n540\t\n541\t/**\n542\t * Get stats for a specific pattern\n543\t */\n544\tfunction getStatsForPattern(\n545\t  routeId: string,\n546\t  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n547\t  fromStationId: string,\n548\t  toStationId: string,\n549\t  timeBucket: TimeBucket,\n550\t  dayCategory: DayCategory\n551\t): AggregatedStats | null {\n552\t  // Try exact match first\n553\t  const exactKey = buildPatternKey(\n554\t    routeId,\n555\t    direction,\n556\t    fromStationId,\n557\t    toStationId,\n558\t    timeBucket,\n559\t    dayCategory\n560\t  );\n561\t  let stats = aggregatedStats.get(exactKey);\n562\t\n563\t  if (!stats) {\n564\t    // Try same time bucket, any day\n565\t    for (const dc of [\"weekday\", \"saturday\", \"sunday\"] as DayCategory[]) {\n566\t      const key = buildPatternKey(routeId, direction, fromStationId, toStationId, timeBucket, dc);\n567\t      stats = aggregatedStats.get(key);\n568\t      if (stats && stats.totalObservations >= config.minObservations) {\n569\t        break;\n570\t      }\n571\t    }\n572\t  }\n573\t\n574\t  return stats ?? null;\n575\t}\n576\t\n577\t/**\n578\t * Get aggregated stats for a segment across all times\n579\t */\n580\tfunction getSegmentStats(\n581\t  routeId: string,\n582\t  fromStationId: string,\n583\t  toStationId: string\n584\t): { totalObservations: number; avgDelayRatio: number } | null {\n585\t  let totalObs = 0;\n586\t  let weightedDelayRatio = 0;\n587\t\n588\t  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n589\t    if (\n590\t      stats.routeId === routeId &&\n591\t      stats.fromStationId === fromStationId &&\n592\t      stats.toStationId === toStationId\n593\t    ) {\n594\t      totalObs += stats.totalObservations;\n595\t      weightedDelayRatio += stats.avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n596\t    }\n597\t  }\n598\t\n599\t  if (totalObs === 0) return null;\n600\t\n601\t  return {\n602\t    totalObservations: totalObs,\n603\t    avgDelayRatio: weightedDelayRatio / totalObs,\n604\t  };\n605\t}\n606\t\n607\t/**\n608\t * Convert aggregated stats to DelayStats\n609\t */\n610\tfunction convertToDelayStats(stats: AggregatedStats): DelayStats {\n611\t  const sortedRatios = [...stats.delayRatios].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n612\t  const len = sortedRatios.length;\n613\t\n614\t  return {\n615\t    routeId: stats.routeId,\n616\t    direction: stats.direction,\n617\t    fromStationId: stats.fromStationId,\n618\t    toStationId: stats.toStationId,\n619\t    totalObservations: stats.totalObservations,\n620\t    delayCount: stats.delayCount,\n621\t    avgDelayRatio: stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length,\n622\t    maxDelayRatio: Math.max(...stats.delayRatios),\n623\t    medianDelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len / 2)] : 0,\n624\t    p90DelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len * 0.9)] : 0,\n625\t    p95DelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len * 0.95)] : 0,\n626\t    lastUpdated: new Date(stats.lastUpdated).toISOString(),\n627\t  };\n628\t}\n629\t\n630\t/**\n631\t * Get weather impact factor\n632\t */\n633\tfunction getWeatherFactor(condition: WeatherCondition): DelayFactor {\n634\t  const weatherFactors: Record<WeatherCondition, { impact: number; description: string }> = {\n635\t    clear: { impact: 0, description: \"Clear weather - normal conditions\" },\n636\t    cloudy: { impact: 0.05, description: \"Cloudy weather - slightly increased delay risk\" },\n637\t    rain: { impact: 0.15, description: \"Rain - moderate delay risk increase\" },\n638\t    heavy_rain: { impact: 0.3, description: \"Heavy rain - significant delay risk\" },\n639\t    snow: { impact: 0.4, description: \"Snow - high delay risk\" },\n640\t    heavy_snow: { impact: 0.6, description: \"Heavy snow - severe delay risk\" },\n641\t    extreme: { impact: 0.8, description: \"Extreme weather - very high delay risk\" },\n642\t  };\n643\t\n644\t  const factor = weatherFactors[condition] ?? weatherFactors.clear;\n645\t\n646\t  return {\n647\t    type: \"weather\",\n648\t    description: factor.description,\n649\t    impact: factor.impact,\n650\t    weight: 0.1,\n651\t  };\n652\t}\n653\t\n654\t/**\n655\t * Get time bucket impact factor\n656\t */\n657\tfunction getTimeBucketFactor(bucket: TimeBucket): number {\n658\t  const factors: Record<TimeBucket, number> = {\n659\t    early_morning: -0.1, // Less delays early morning\n660\t    morning_rush: 0.2, // More delays during rush\n661\t    midday: -0.05, // Fewer delays midday\n662\t    evening_rush: 0.25, // Most delays during evening rush\n663\t    night: -0.15, // Fewest delays at night\n664\t  };\n665\t\n666\t  return factors[bucket] ?? 0;\n667\t}\n668\t\n669\t/**\n670\t * Get day category impact factor\n671\t */\n672\tfunction getDayCategoryFactor(category: DayCategory): number {\n673\t  const factors: Record<DayCategory, number> = {\n674\t    weekday: 0.1, // More delays on weekdays\n675\t    saturday: -0.1, // Fewer delays on Saturday\n676\t    sunday: -0.15, // Fewest delays on Sunday\n677\t  };\n678\t\n679\t  return factors[category] ?? 0;\n680\t}\n681\t\n682\t/**\n683\t * Determine delay severity from ratio\n684\t */\n685\tfunction getDelaySeverity(ratio: number): DelaySeverity {\n686\t  if (ratio < 1.2) return \"none\";\n687\t  if (ratio < 1.5) return \"minor\";\n688\t  if (ratio < 2.0) return \"moderate\";\n689\t  if (ratio < 3.0) return \"major\";\n690\t  return \"severe\";\n691\t}\n692\t\n693\t/**\n694\t * Calculate confidence based on observation count\n695\t */\n696\tfunction calculateConfidence(observations: number): number {\n697\t  // More observations = higher confidence, capped at 0.95\n698\t  return Math.min(0.95, observations / 100);\n699\t}\n700\t\n701\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n702\t// Weather management\n703\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n704\t\n705\t/**\n706\t * Update current weather condition\n707\t * Call this periodically with weather API data\n708\t */\n709\texport function updateWeather(condition: WeatherCondition): void {\n710\t  currentWeather = condition;\n711\t}\n712\t\n713\t/**\n714\t * Set weather override (for testing)\n715\t */\n716\texport function setWeatherOverride(condition: WeatherCondition | null): void {\n717\t  weatherOverride = condition;\n718\t}\n719\t\n720\t/**\n721\t * Get current weather condition\n722\t */\n723\texport function getCurrentWeather(): WeatherCondition {\n724\t  return weatherOverride ?? currentWeather;\n725\t}\n726\t\n727\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n728\t// Public API for stats and management\n729\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n730\t\n731\t/**\n732\t * Get all delay records (for debugging/analysis)\n733\t */\n734\texport function getAllDelayRecords(): DelayRecord[] {\n735\t  return delayRecords.map((r) => ({\n736\t    id: r.id,\n737\t    routeId: r.routeId,\n738\t    direction: r.direction,\n739\t    fromStationId: r.fromStationId,\n740\t    toStationId: r.toStationId,\n741\t    actualSeconds: r.actualSeconds,\n742\t    scheduledSeconds: r.scheduledSeconds,\n743\t    delayRatio: r.delayRatio,\n744\t    timestamp: r.timestamp,\n745\t    timeBucket: r.timeBucket,\n746\t    dayCategory: r.dayCategory,\n747\t    weather: r.weather,\n748\t    tripId: r.tripId,\n749\t  }));\n750\t}\n751\t\n752\t/**\n753\t * Get the count of delay records\n754\t */\n755\texport function getDelayRecordCount(): number {\n756\t  return delayRecords.length;\n757\t}\n758\t\n759\t/**\n760\t * Get the count of aggregated patterns\n761\t */\n762\texport function getAggregatedPatternCount(): number {\n763\t  return aggregatedStats.size;\n764\t}\n765\t\n766\t/**\n767\t * Reset all delay predictor state (for testing)\n768\t */\n769\texport function resetDelayPredictor(): void {\n770\t  delayRecords = [];\n771\t  aggregatedStats.clear();\n772\t  weatherOverride = null;\n773\t  currentWeather = DEFAULT_WEATHER;\n774\t}\n775\t\n776\t/**\n777\t * Get delay predictor status\n778\t */\n779\texport function getDelayPredictorStatus(): {\n780\t  totalRecords: number;\n781\t  aggregatedPatterns: number;\n782\t  minObservations: number;\n783\t  currentWeather: WeatherCondition;\n784\t} {\n785\t  return {\n786\t    totalRecords: delayRecords.length,\n787\t    aggregatedPatterns: aggregatedStats.size,\n788\t    minObservations: config?.minObservations ?? MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n789\t    currentWeather: weatherOverride ?? currentWeather,\n790\t  };\n791\t}\n792\t\n793\t/**\n794\t * Initialize delay predictor with default config for testing.\n795\t */\n796\texport function initDelayPredictorForTesting(): void {\n797\t  config = {\n798\t    maxRecords: MAX_DELAY_RECORDS,\n799\t    minObservations: MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n800\t    persistencePath: \"\",\n801\t  };\n802\t  _travelTimes = {};\n803\t  stations = {};\n804\t}\n805\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"02188032-7627-4c34-8f5d-0df6e79e2196","uuid":"27fe7faa-efd3-42ef-a86f-13318eeb1824","timestamp":"2026-07-04T03:55:26.108Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/delay-predictor.ts","content":"/**\n * Predictive delay modeling using historical MTA data.\n *\n * Analyzes patterns in delay frequencies by route, time of day, day of week,\n * and weather conditions. Provides delay probability estimates for trips.\n *\n * Design:\n * - Collects delay data from the real-time delay detector\n * - Buckets data by time of day and day category\n * - Computes statistical aggregations for route/segment combinations\n * - Provides predictions based on historical patterns\n *\n * Data retention:\n * - In-memory storage with configurable max records (default: 100k)\n * - Optional persistence to JSON file\n */\n\nimport type {\n  DayCategory,\n  DelayFactor,\n  DelayPattern,\n  DelayPrediction,\n  DelayRecord,\n  DelayStats,\n  RouteDelaySummary,\n  StationIndex,\n  TimeBucket,\n  TravelTimeIndex,\n  WeatherCondition,\n} from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport { logger } from \"./observability/logger.js\";\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Configuration\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Maximum number of delay records to keep in memory */\nconst MAX_DELAY_RECORDS = 100_000;\n\n/** Minimum observations before providing predictions */\nconst MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION = 5;\n\n/** Default weather condition when no data available */\nconst DEFAULT_WEATHER: WeatherCondition = \"clear\";\n\n/** Probability threshold for considering a delay \"likely\" */\nconst _DELAY_PROBABILITY_THRESHOLD = 0.3;\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Types\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Delay record with metadata for internal storage */\ninterface StoredDelayRecord extends DelayRecord {\n  /** Unix timestamp for faster sorting */\n  timestampMs: number;\n}\n\n/** Aggregated delay statistics keyed by pattern */\ninterface _PatternKey {\n  routeId: string;\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\";\n  fromStationId: string;\n  toStationId: string;\n  timeBucket: TimeBucket;\n  dayCategory: DayCategory;\n}\n\n/** Aggregated stats for a pattern */\ninterface AggregatedStats {\n  routeId: string;\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\";\n  fromStationId: string;\n  toStationId: string;\n  timeBucket: TimeBucket;\n  dayCategory: DayCategory;\n  totalObservations: number;\n  delayCount: number;\n  delayRatios: number[];\n  lastUpdated: number;\n}\n\n/** Delay predictor configuration */\nexport interface DelayPredictorConfig {\n  /** Max delay records to keep in memory (default: 100k) */\n  maxRecords?: number;\n  /** Minimum observations for predictions (default: 5) */\n  minObservations?: number;\n  /** Path to persist delay data (optional) */\n  persistencePath?: string;\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Module state\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Historical delay records */\nlet delayRecords: StoredDelayRecord[] = [];\n\n/** Aggregated statistics by pattern key */\nconst aggregatedStats = new Map<string, AggregatedStats>();\n\n/** Weather override (for testing; null = use actual weather) */\nlet weatherOverride: WeatherCondition | null = null;\n\n/** Current weather condition (cached) */\nlet currentWeather: WeatherCondition = DEFAULT_WEATHER;\n\nlet config: Required<DelayPredictorConfig>;\nlet _travelTimes: TravelTimeIndex | null = null;\nlet stations: StationIndex | null = null;\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Time bucket utilities\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Get the time bucket for a given hour\n */\nexport function getTimeBucket(hour: number): TimeBucket {\n  if (hour >= 4 && hour < 6) return \"early_morning\";\n  if (hour >= 6 && hour < 10) return \"morning_rush\";\n  if (hour >= 10 && hour < 15) return \"midday\";\n  if (hour >= 15 && hour < 19) return \"evening_rush\";\n  return \"night\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the time bucket for a timestamp\n */\nexport function getTimeBucketForTimestamp(timestamp: number): TimeBucket {\n  const date = new Date(timestamp);\n  return getTimeBucket(date.getHours());\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the day category for a date\n */\nexport function getDayCategory(date: Date): DayCategory {\n  const day = date.getDay();\n  if (day === 0) return \"sunday\";\n  if (day === 6) return \"saturday\";\n  return \"weekday\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the day category for a timestamp\n */\nexport function getDayCategoryForTimestamp(timestamp: number): DayCategory {\n  return getDayCategory(new Date(timestamp));\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Initialization\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Initialize the delay predictor with dependencies.\n */\nexport function initDelayPredictor(\n  travelTimesData: TravelTimeIndex,\n  stationData: StationIndex,\n  predictorConfig?: DelayPredictorConfig\n): void {\n  _travelTimes = travelTimesData;\n  stations = stationData;\n  config = {\n    maxRecords: predictorConfig?.maxRecords ?? MAX_DELAY_RECORDS,\n    minObservations: predictorConfig?.minObservations ?? MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n    persistencePath: predictorConfig?.persistencePath ?? \"\",\n  };\n\n  logger.info(\"Delay predictor initialized\", {\n    maxRecords: config.maxRecords,\n    minObservations: config.minObservations,\n  });\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Data collection\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Record a delay observation from the delay detector.\n * Called automatically when a delayed segment is detected.\n */\nexport function recordDelay(\n  routeId: string,\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n  fromStationId: string,\n  toStationId: string,\n  actualSeconds: number,\n  scheduledSeconds: number,\n  tripId: string\n): void {\n  const now = Date.now();\n  const delayRatio = actualSeconds / scheduledSeconds;\n\n  const record: StoredDelayRecord = {\n    id: `${tripId}-${fromStationId}-${toStationId}-${now}`,\n    routeId,\n    direction,\n    fromStationId,\n    toStationId,\n    actualSeconds,\n    scheduledSeconds,\n    delayRatio,\n    timestamp: new Date(now).toISOString(),\n    timestampMs: now,\n    timeBucket: getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now),\n    dayCategory: getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now),\n    tripId,\n    weather: weatherOverride ?? currentWeather,\n  };\n\n  delayRecords.push(record);\n\n  // Trim if exceeding max\n  if (delayRecords.length > config.maxRecords) {\n    delayRecords = delayRecords.slice(-config.maxRecords);\n  }\n\n  // Update aggregated stats\n  updateAggregatedStats(record);\n\n  logger.debug(\"Delay recorded\", {\n    routeId,\n    direction,\n    from: fromStationId,\n    to: toStationId,\n    delayRatio: Math.round(delayRatio * 100) / 100,\n    totalRecords: delayRecords.length,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Update aggregated statistics for a pattern\n */\nfunction updateAggregatedStats(record: StoredDelayRecord): void {\n  const key = buildPatternKey(\n    record.routeId,\n    record.direction,\n    record.fromStationId,\n    record.toStationId,\n    record.timeBucket,\n    record.dayCategory\n  );\n\n  let stats = aggregatedStats.get(key);\n\n  if (!stats) {\n    stats = {\n      routeId: record.routeId,\n      direction: record.direction,\n      fromStationId: record.fromStationId,\n      toStationId: record.toStationId,\n      timeBucket: record.timeBucket,\n      dayCategory: record.dayCategory,\n      totalObservations: 0,\n      delayCount: 0,\n      delayRatios: [],\n      lastUpdated: Date.now(),\n    };\n    aggregatedStats.set(key, stats);\n  }\n\n  stats.totalObservations++;\n  stats.delayCount++;\n  stats.delayRatios.push(record.delayRatio);\n  stats.lastUpdated = Date.now();\n\n  // Keep only last 1000 delay ratios per pattern\n  if (stats.delayRatios.length > 1000) {\n    stats.delayRatios = stats.delayRatios.slice(-1000);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Build a pattern key for aggregated stats lookup\n */\nfunction buildPatternKey(\n  routeId: string,\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n  fromStationId: string,\n  toStationId: string,\n  timeBucket: TimeBucket,\n  dayCategory: DayCategory\n): string {\n  return `${routeId}:${direction}:${fromStationId}:${toStationId}:${timeBucket}:${dayCategory}`;\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Prediction API\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Get a delay prediction for a trip between two stations.\n * Returns prediction with probability and factors.\n */\nexport function predictDelay(\n  routeId: string,\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n  fromStationId: string,\n  toStationId: string,\n  scheduledSeconds: number\n): DelayPrediction | null {\n  if (!stations) return null;\n\n  const now = Date.now();\n  const timeBucket = getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now);\n  const dayCategory = getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now);\n\n  // Get historical stats for this pattern\n  const stats = getStatsForPattern(\n    routeId,\n    direction,\n    fromStationId,\n    toStationId,\n    timeBucket,\n    dayCategory\n  );\n\n  if (!stats || stats.totalObservations < config.minObservations) {\n    // Not enough data - return null\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  // Calculate base delay probability\n  const delayProbability = stats.delayCount / stats.totalObservations;\n\n  // Get weather impact\n  const weather = weatherOverride ?? currentWeather;\n  const weatherFactor = getWeatherFactor(weather);\n\n  // Adjust probability based on weather\n  const adjustedProbability = Math.min(1, delayProbability * (1 + weatherFactor.impact));\n\n  // Calculate predicted time\n  const avgDelayRatio = stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length;\n  const predictedSeconds = scheduledSeconds * avgDelayRatio;\n\n  // Determine severity\n  const severity = getDelaySeverity(avgDelayRatio);\n\n  // Build factors list\n  const factors: DelayFactor[] = [\n    {\n      type: \"historical\",\n      description: `Based on ${stats.totalObservations} historical observations`,\n      impact: delayProbability - 0.2, // Baseline\n      weight: 0.6,\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"time_of_day\",\n      description: `Current time bucket: ${timeBucket.replace(/_/g, \" \")}`,\n      impact: getTimeBucketFactor(timeBucket),\n      weight: 0.2,\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"day_of_week\",\n      description: `Today is a ${dayCategory}`,\n      impact: getDayCategoryFactor(dayCategory),\n      weight: 0.1,\n    },\n    weatherFactor,\n  ];\n\n  // Add segment-specific factor if we have enough data\n  const segmentStats = getSegmentStats(routeId, fromStationId, toStationId);\n  if (segmentStats && segmentStats.totalObservations >= config.minObservations) {\n    factors.push({\n      type: \"segment\",\n      description: `This segment has ${Math.round(segmentStats.avgDelayRatio * 100)}% average delay ratio`,\n      impact: segmentStats.avgDelayRatio - 1,\n      weight: 0.1,\n    });\n  }\n\n  const fromStation = stations[fromStationId]?.name ?? fromStationId;\n  const toStation = stations[toStationId]?.name ?? toStationId;\n\n  return {\n    tripId: `prediction-${now}`,\n    routeId,\n    direction,\n    fromStationId,\n    fromStationName: fromStation,\n    toStationId,\n    toStationName: toStation,\n    scheduledMinutes: Math.round(scheduledSeconds / 60),\n    predictedMinutes: Math.round(predictedSeconds / 60),\n    delayProbability: Math.round(adjustedProbability * 100) / 100,\n    delaySeverity: severity,\n    confidence: calculateConfidence(stats.totalObservations),\n    factors,\n    predictedAt: new Date(now).toISOString(),\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Get delay probability for a route at current time\n */\nexport function getRouteDelayProbability(routeId: string, direction: \"N\" | \"S\"): number | null {\n  const now = Date.now();\n  const timeBucket = getTimeBucketForTimestamp(now);\n  const dayCategory = getDayCategoryForTimestamp(now);\n\n  // Get all stats for this route/direction/time/day\n  let totalObservations = 0;\n  let totalDelays = 0;\n\n  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n    if (\n      stats.routeId === routeId &&\n      stats.direction === direction &&\n      stats.timeBucket === timeBucket &&\n      stats.dayCategory === dayCategory\n    ) {\n      totalObservations += stats.totalObservations;\n      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (totalObservations < config.minObservations) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return totalDelays / totalObservations;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get delay patterns for a route\n */\nexport function getRouteDelayPatterns(routeId: string, direction: \"N\" | \"S\"): DelayPattern[] {\n  const patterns: DelayPattern[] = [];\n\n  // Group by time bucket and day category\n  const patternGroups = new Map<string, AggregatedStats[]>();\n\n  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n    if (stats.routeId === routeId && stats.direction === direction) {\n      const key = `${stats.timeBucket}:${stats.dayCategory}`;\n      if (!patternGroups.has(key)) {\n        patternGroups.set(key, []);\n      }\n      patternGroups.get(key)!.push(stats);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Build patterns\n  for (const [key, groupStats] of patternGroups) {\n    const [timeBucket, dayCategory] = key.split(\":\") as [TimeBucket, DayCategory];\n\n    let totalObs = 0;\n    let totalDelays = 0;\n    let totalDelayRatio = 0;\n\n    for (const stats of groupStats) {\n      totalObs += stats.totalObservations;\n      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n      totalDelayRatio += stats.avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n    }\n\n    patterns.push({\n      timeBucket,\n      dayCategory,\n      stats: groupStats.map(convertToDelayStats),\n      overallDelayProbability: totalObs > 0 ? totalDelays / totalObs : 0,\n      avgDelayMinutes: totalObs > 0 ? (totalDelayRatio / totalObs) * 5 : 0, // Rough estimate\n    });\n  }\n\n  return patterns;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get route delay summary\n */\nexport function getRouteDelaySummary(routeId: string): RouteDelaySummary | null {\n  let totalObservations = 0;\n  let totalDelays = 0;\n  let totalDelayRatio = 0;\n\n  const segmentDelays = new Map<string, { from: string; to: string; sum: number; count: number }>();\n\n  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n    if (stats.routeId === routeId) {\n      totalObservations += stats.totalObservations;\n      totalDelays += stats.delayCount;\n      const avgDelayRatio = stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length;\n      totalDelayRatio += avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n\n      const segKey = `${stats.fromStationId}:${stats.toStationId}`;\n      if (!segmentDelays.has(segKey)) {\n        segmentDelays.set(segKey, {\n          from: stats.fromStationId,\n          to: stats.toStationId,\n          sum: 0,\n          count: 0,\n        });\n      }\n      const seg = segmentDelays.get(segKey)!;\n      seg.sum += avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n      seg.count += stats.totalObservations;\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (totalObservations === 0) return null;\n\n  const onTimePercent = 100 - (totalDelays / totalObservations) * 100;\n  const avgDelay = totalDelayRatio / totalObservations;\n  const reliabilityScore = Math.max(0, 100 - avgDelay * 20);\n\n  // Get worst segments\n  const worstSegments = Array.from(segmentDelays.entries())\n    .map(([, data]) => ({\n      fromStationId: data.from,\n      fromStationName: stations?.[data.from]?.name ?? data.from,\n      toStationId: data.to,\n      toStationName: stations?.[data.to]?.name ?? data.to,\n      avgDelayRatio: data.count > 0 ? data.sum / data.count : 0,\n    }))\n    .sort((a, b) => b.avgDelayRatio - a.avgDelayRatio)\n    .slice(0, 5);\n\n  return {\n    routeId,\n    reliabilityScore: Math.round(reliabilityScore),\n    avgDelayMinutes: Math.round(avgDelay * 5), // Rough estimate\n    onTimePercentage: Math.round(onTimePercent),\n    bestTimeBucket: \"midday\", // Simplified\n    worstTimeBucket: \"evening_rush\", // Simplified\n    worstSegments,\n  };\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helper functions\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Get stats for a specific pattern\n */\nfunction getStatsForPattern(\n  routeId: string,\n  direction: \"N\" | \"S\",\n  fromStationId: string,\n  toStationId: string,\n  timeBucket: TimeBucket,\n  dayCategory: DayCategory\n): AggregatedStats | null {\n  // Try exact match first\n  const exactKey = buildPatternKey(\n    routeId,\n    direction,\n    fromStationId,\n    toStationId,\n    timeBucket,\n    dayCategory\n  );\n  let stats = aggregatedStats.get(exactKey);\n\n  if (!stats) {\n    // Try same time bucket, any day\n    for (const dc of [\"weekday\", \"saturday\", \"sunday\"] as DayCategory[]) {\n      const key = buildPatternKey(routeId, direction, fromStationId, toStationId, timeBucket, dc);\n      stats = aggregatedStats.get(key);\n      if (stats && stats.totalObservations >= config.minObservations) {\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return stats ?? null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get aggregated stats for a segment across all times\n */\nfunction getSegmentStats(\n  routeId: string,\n  fromStationId: string,\n  toStationId: string\n): { totalObservations: number; avgDelayRatio: number } | null {\n  let totalObs = 0;\n  let weightedDelayRatio = 0;\n\n  for (const stats of aggregatedStats.values()) {\n    if (\n      stats.routeId === routeId &&\n      stats.fromStationId === fromStationId &&\n      stats.toStationId === toStationId\n    ) {\n      totalObs += stats.totalObservations;\n      weightedDelayRatio += stats.avgDelayRatio * stats.totalObservations;\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (totalObs === 0) return null;\n\n  return {\n    totalObservations: totalObs,\n    avgDelayRatio: weightedDelayRatio / totalObs,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert aggregated stats to DelayStats\n */\nfunction convertToDelayStats(stats: AggregatedStats): DelayStats {\n  const sortedRatios = [...stats.delayRatios].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n  const len = sortedRatios.length;\n\n  return {\n    routeId: stats.routeId,\n    direction: stats.direction,\n    fromStationId: stats.fromStationId,\n    toStationId: stats.toStationId,\n    totalObservations: stats.totalObservations,\n    delayCount: stats.delayCount,\n    avgDelayRatio: stats.delayRatios.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / stats.delayRatios.length,\n    maxDelayRatio: Math.max(...stats.delayRatios),\n    medianDelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len / 2)] : 0,\n    p90DelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len * 0.9)] : 0,\n    p95DelayRatio: len > 0 ? sortedRatios[Math.floor(len * 0.95)] : 0,\n    lastUpdated: new Date(stats.lastUpdated).toISOString(),\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Get weather impact factor\n */\nfunction getWeatherFactor(condition: WeatherCondition): DelayFactor {\n  const weatherFactors: Record<WeatherCondition, { impact: number; description: string }> = {\n    clear: { impact: 0, description: \"Clear weather - normal conditions\" },\n    cloudy: { impact: 0.05, description: \"Cloudy weather - slightly increased delay risk\" },\n    rain: { impact: 0.15, description: \"Rain - moderate delay risk increase\" },\n    heavy_rain: { impact: 0.3, description: \"Heavy rain - significant delay risk\" },\n    snow: { impact: 0.4, description: \"Snow - high delay risk\" },\n    heavy_snow: { impact: 0.6, description: \"Heavy snow - severe delay risk\" },\n    extreme: { impact: 0.8, description: \"Extreme weather - very high delay risk\" },\n  };\n\n  const factor = weatherFactors[condition] ?? weatherFactors.clear;\n\n  return {\n    type: \"weather\",\n    description: factor.description,\n    impact: factor.impact,\n    weight: 0.1,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Get time bucket impact factor\n */\nfunction getTimeBucketFactor(bucket: TimeBucket): number {\n  const factors: Record<TimeBucket, number> = {\n    early_morning: -0.1, // Less delays early morning\n    morning_rush: 0.2, // More delays during rush\n    midday: -0.05, // Fewer delays midday\n    evening_rush: 0.25, // Most delays during evening rush\n    night: -0.15, // Fewest delays at night\n  };\n\n  return factors[bucket] ?? 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get day category impact factor\n */\nfunction getDayCategoryFactor(category: DayCategory): number {\n  const factors: Record<DayCategory, number> = {\n    weekday: 0.1, // More delays on weekdays\n    saturday: -0.1, // Fewer delays on Saturday\n    sunday: -0.15, // Fewest delays on Sunday\n  };\n\n  return factors[category] ?? 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Determine delay severity from ratio\n */\nfunction getDelaySeverity(ratio: number): DelaySeverity {\n  if (ratio < 1.2) return \"none\";\n  if (ratio < 1.5) return \"minor\";\n  if (ratio < 2.0) return \"moderate\";\n  if (ratio < 3.0) return \"major\";\n  return \"severe\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate confidence based on observation count\n */\nfunction calculateConfidence(observations: number): number {\n  // More observations = higher confidence, capped at 0.95\n  return Math.min(0.95, observations / 100);\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Weather management\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Update current weather condition\n * Call this periodically with weather API data\n */\nexport function updateWeather(condition: WeatherCondition): void {\n  currentWeather = condition;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set weather override (for testing)\n */\nexport function setWeatherOverride(condition: WeatherCondition | null): void {\n  weatherOverride = condition;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get current weather condition\n */\nexport function getCurrentWeather(): WeatherCondition {\n  return weatherOverride ?? currentWeather;\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Public API for stats and management\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Get all delay records (for debugging/analysis)\n */\nexport function getAllDelayRecords(): DelayRecord[] {\n  return delayRecords.map((r) => ({\n    id: r.id,\n    routeId: r.routeId,\n    direction: r.direction,\n    fromStationId: r.fromStationId,\n    toStationId: r.toStationId,\n    actualSeconds: r.actualSeconds,\n    scheduledSeconds: r.scheduledSeconds,\n    delayRatio: r.delayRatio,\n    timestamp: r.timestamp,\n    timeBucket: r.timeBucket,\n    dayCategory: r.dayCategory,\n    weather: r.weather,\n    tripId: r.tripId,\n  }));\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the count of delay records\n */\nexport function getDelayRecordCount(): number {\n  return delayRecords.length;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the count of aggregated patterns\n */\nexport function getAggregatedPatternCount(): number {\n  return aggregatedStats.size;\n}\n\n/**\n * Reset all delay predictor state (for testing)\n */\nexport function resetDelayPredictor(): void {\n  delayRecords = [];\n  aggregatedStats.clear();\n  weatherOverride = null;\n  currentWeather = DEFAULT_WEATHER;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get delay predictor status\n */\nexport function getDelayPredictorStatus(): {\n  totalRecords: number;\n  aggregatedPatterns: number;\n  minObservations: number;\n  currentWeather: WeatherCondition;\n} {\n  return {\n    totalRecords: delayRecords.length,\n    aggregatedPatterns: aggregatedStats.size,\n    minObservations: config?.minObservations ?? MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n    currentWeather: weatherOverride ?? currentWeather,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Initialize delay predictor with default config for testing.\n */\nexport function initDelayPredictorForTesting(): void {\n  config = {\n    maxRecords: MAX_DELAY_RECORDS,\n    minObservations: MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n    persistencePath: \"\",\n  };\n  _travelTimes = {};\n  stations = {};\n}\n","numLines":805,"startLine":1,"totalLines":805}}}

TEST_MODE Environment Variable Trace\n\n## Overview\n\nThis document traces the complete flow of the `TEST_MODE` environment variable from Playwright configuration through server startup to runtime behavior changes.\n\n## Flow Summary\n\n```\nPlaywright Config → Server Process → Server Entry Point → Behavior Changes\n```\n\n---\n\n## Step 1: Playwright Configuration\n\n**File:** `tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts`\n**Line:** 57\n\n```typescript\nwebServer: {\n  command: \"cd ../.. && TEST_MODE=true npx tsx packages/server/src/index.ts\",\n  url: \"http://localhost:3001\",\n  reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,\n  timeout: 300 * 1000,\n}\n```\n\n**What happens:**\n- Playwright sets `TEST_MODE=true` as an environment variable in the subprocess command\n- The server process inherits this environment variable\n- No explicit port override - uses default PORT env var or 3001\n\n---\n\n## Step 2: Server Entry Point Reads TEST_MODE\n\n**File:** `packages/server/src/index.ts`\n**Line:** 94\n\n```typescript\nconst testMode = process.env[\"TEST_MODE\"] === \"true\";\n```\n\n**What happens:**\n- Server reads the environment variable at startup\n- Converts string \"true\" to boolean `testMode`\n- This boolean is used for conditional behavior\n\n**Line 58:** PORT is read separately (no TEST_MODE interaction)\n```typescript\nconst PORT = parseInt(process.env[\"PORT\"] ?? \"3001\", 10);\n```\n\n---\n\n## Step 3A: Rate Limiter Test Mode\n\n**File:** `packages/server/src/index.ts`\n**Line:** 96\n\n```typescript\nif (testMode) {\n  setRateLimiterTestMode(true);\n  logger.info(\"Test mode enabled\");\n}\n```\n\n**Implementation:** `packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts`\n**Lines:** 22-28 (setter), 68-72 (usage)\n\n```typescript\n// Module state (line 22-23)\nlet testMode = false;\n\nexport function setRateLimiterTestMode(enabled: boolean): void {\n  testMode = enabled;\n}\n\n// In middleware (lines 68-72)\nexport function rateLimiter(): MiddlewareHandler {\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    // Skip rate limiting in test mode\n    if (testMode) {\n      await next();\n      return;\n    }\n    // ... normal rate limiting logic\n  };\n}\n```\n\n**Behavior change:**\n- When `testMode=true`, rate limiting middleware is bypassed\n- All requests proceed without 429 rate limit responses\n- No This means the test mode initialization may not have its intended effect.\n173\t\n174\t**Recommendation**: If test mode should use empty/dummy data, the normal initialization should be skipped:\n175\t```typescript\n176\tif (testMode) {\n177\t  initDelayPredictorForTesting();\n178\t} else {\n179\t  initDelayPredictor(travelTimes, stations);\n180\t}\n181\t```\n182\t\n183\t---\n184\t\n185\t## Environment Variable Propagation\n186\t\n187\tNo gaps identified in environment variable propagation:\n188\t\n189\t1. Security Validation Skipped (index.ts:73 → security-startup.ts:44, 47-50)\n\n```typescript\n// index.ts:73\nvalidateSecurityOrThrow();\n\n// security-startup.ts:44\nconst isTest = process.env[\"TEST_MODE\"] === \"true\";\n\n// security-startup.ts:47-50\nif (isTest) {\n  logger.debug(\"Security validation skipped in test mode\");\n  return result;\n}\n```\n\n**Files**: \n- Entry: `packages/server/src/index.ts:73`\n- Implementation: `packages/server/src/security-startup.ts:44, 47-50`\n\n**Effect**: Skips security validation checks including:\n- ALLOWED_HOSTS validation (host header injection protection)\n- PASSWORD_PEPPER validation\n- VAPID keys validation\n\n---\n\n#### B. Rate Limiter Disabled (index.ts:96 → rate-limiter.ts:26-28, 69-72)\n\n```typescript\n// index.ts:96\nsetRateLimiterTestMode(true);\n\n// rate-limiter.ts:26-28\nexport function setRateLimiterTestMode(enabled: boolean): void {\n  testMode = enabled;\n}\n\n// rate-limiter.ts:69-72\nexport function rateLimiter(): MiddlewareHandler {\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    // Skip rate limiting in test mode\n    if (testMode) {\n      await next();\n      return;\n    }\n    // ... normal rate limiting logic\n  };\n}\n```\n\n**Files**:\n- Entry: `packages/server/src/index.ts:96`\n- Implementation: `packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts:26-28, 69-72`\n- Applied at: `packages/server/src/app.ts:483` (`app.use(\"/api/*\", rateLimiter())`)\n\n**Effect**: Rate limiting middleware (60 req/min per IP) is completely bypassed for all API routes.\n\n**Normal behavior**: Token bucket rate limiter tracks IP addresses and enforces 60 requests per minute.\n\n**Test mode behavior**: All requests pass through immediately without tracking or limiting.\n\n---\n\n#### C. Delay Predictor Test Mode (index.ts:128-130 → delay-predictor.ts:796-804)\n\n```typescript\n// index.ts:128-130\nif (testMode) {\n  initDelayPredictorForTesting();\n}\n\n// delay-predictor.ts:796-804\nexport function initDelayPredictorForTesting(): void {\n  config = {\n    maxRecords: MAX_DELAY_RECORDS,\n    minObservations: MIN_OBSERVATIONS_FOR_PREDICTION,\n    persistencePath: \"\",\n  };\n  _travelTimes = {};\n  stations = {};\n}\n```\n\n**Files**:\n- Entry: `packages/server/src/index.ts:128-130`\n- Implementation: `packages/server/src/delay-predictor.ts:796-804`\n\n**Effect**: Initializes delay predictor with empty/dummy state for testing.\n\n**Normal behavior**: `initDelayPredictor()` is called with real travel times and station data.\n\n**Test mode behavior**: Empty objects are used for `_travelTimes` and `stations`, and default config is set.\n\n**Note**: After `initDelayPredictorForTesting()`, the normal `initDelayPredictor(travelTimes, stations)` is still called at line 131, which would overwrite the empty state. This suggests the test mode initialization may not be fully effective as intended.\n\n---\n\n#### D. Test Mode Logging (index.ts:98)\n\n```typescript\nif (testMode) {\n  setRateLimiterTestMode(true);\n  logger.info(\"Test mode enabled\");\n}\n```\n\n**File**: `packages/server/src/index.ts:98`\n\n**Effect**: Logs \"Test mode enabled\" to the console/log output for debugging purposes.\n\n---\n\n## Summary of TEST_MODE Effects\n\n| Component | Normal Behavior | TEST_MODE Behavior | File Reference |\n|-----------|----------------|-------------------|----------------|\n| Security validation | Validates ALLOWED_HOSTS, PASSWORD_PEPPER, VAPID keys | Skips all validation | security-startup.ts:47-50 |\n| Rate limiting | 60 req/min per IP (token bucket) | Completely disabled | rate-limiter.ts:69-72 |\n| Delay predictor | Initialized with real data | Empty/dummy state (then overwritten) | delay-predictor.ts:796-804 |\n| Logging | Normal startup logs | Additional \"Test mode enabled\" log | index.ts:98 |\n\n---\n\n## Potential Issues\n\n### Delay Predictor Test Mode Override May Be Ineffective\n\n**Location**: index.ts:128-131\n\n```typescript\nif (testMode) {\n  initDelayPredictorForTesting();  // Sets _travelTimes = {}, stations = {}\n}\ninitDelayPredictor(travelTimes, stations);  // Overwrites with real data\n```\n\n**Issue**: The test mode initialization sets empty state, but the normal `initDelayPredictor()` is called immediately after, which overwrites the empty state with real data. This means the test mode initialization may not have its intended effect.\n\n**Recommendation**: If test mode should use empty/dummy data, the normal initialization should be skipped:\n```typescript\nif (testMode) {\n  initDelayPredictorForTesting();\n} else {\n  initDelayPredictor(travelTimes, stations);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Environment Variable Propagation\n\nNo gaps identified in environment variable propagation:\n\n1. ALLOWED_HOSTS is set in production (prevents host header injection)\n * - PASSWORD_PEPPER is set (optional but recommended)\n * - VAPID keys are configured (required for push notifications)\n *\n * In development mode, only warnings are issued. In production mode,\n * critical misconfigurations will cause startup to fail.\n */\nexport function validateSecurityConfiguration(): ValidationResult {\n  const result: ValidationResult = {\n    passed: true,\n    warnings: [],\n    errors: [],\n  };\n\n  const isProduction = process.env[\"NODE_ENV\"] === \"production\";\n  const isTest = process.env[\"TEST_MODE\"] === \"true\";\n\n  // Skip validation in test mode\n  if (isTest) {\n    logger.debug(\"Security validation skipped in test mode\");\n    return result;\n  }\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // ALLOWED_HOSTS validation\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  const allowedHosts = process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"];\n  if (!allowedHosts || allowedHosts.trim() === \"\") {\n    const message =\n      \"ALLOWED_HOSTS is not set. This allows any hostname, which may expose the application to host header injection attacks.\";\n\n    if (isProduction) {\n      result.errors.push(message);\n      result.passed = false;\n    } else {\n      result.warnings.push(message + \" (OK for development)\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // PASSWORD_PEPPER validation\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  const passwordPepper = process.env[\"PASSWORD_PEPPER\"];\n  if (!passwordPepper || passwordPepper.trim() === \"\" || passwordPepper.length < 32) {\n    const message =\n      \"PASSWORD_PEPPER is not set or too short (should be at least 32 bytes / 64 hex chars). This reduces password security by removing a layer of defense.\";\n\n    result.warnings.push(message);\n  }\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // VAPID keys validation\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  const vapidPublicKey = process.env[\"VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY\"];\n  const vapidPrivateKey = process.env[\"VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY\"];\n\n  if (!vapidPublicKey || vapidPublicKey.trim() === \"\") {\n    const message = \"VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is not set. Push notifications will not work.\";\n    result.warnings.push(message);\n  }\n\n  if (!vapidPrivateKey || vapidPrivateKey.trim() === \"\") {\n    const message = \"VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY is not set. Push notifications will not work.\";\n    result.warnings.push(message);\n  }\n\n  // Log warnings\n  if (result.warnings.length > 0) {\n    logger.warn(\"Security configuration warnings\", {\n      warnings: result.warnings,\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Log errors and fail in production\n  if (result.errors.length > 0) {\n    logger.error(\"Security configuration errors\", undefined, {\n      errors: result.errors,\n      fatal: true,\n    });\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate security configuration and throw if critical issues are found.\n *\n * Use this at startup to fail-fast on security misconfigurations.\n *\n * @throws Error if critical security issues are found in production\n */\nexport function validateSecurityOrThrow(): void {\n  const result = validateSecurityConfiguration();\n\n  if (!result.passed) {\n    throw new Error(\n      `Security validation failed:\\n${result.errors.map((e) => `  - ${e}`).join(\"\\n\")}`\n    );\n  }\n}\n","numLines":129,"startLine":1,"totalLines":129}}}
